title: lamium purpureum var. incisum
intro: Lamium purpureum var. incisum, also known as Purple Dead Nettle or Cut-leaved Dead Nettle, is a perennial plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Lamium purpureum var. incisum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Lamium purpureum var. incisum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a dietary supplement in some regions.
